en.name: Aqre
en.desc: Shade cells with restrictions! No more than three consecutive shaded cells in any row or column. All unshaded cells must connect. Strategic shading!
en.howToPlay: Click cells to shade them black or mark them as white. No two black cells can touch diagonally. Each row and column can have at most 2 consecutive black cells.
tips: Use clues to determine how many blacks are visible
Avoid creating runs of 3+ consecutive blacks
Start with constrained areas near clues

zh.name: 阿克雷
zh.desc: 有限制地涂黑格子！任何行或列不能有超过三个连续的涂黑格子。所有未涂黑格子必须相连。策略涂色！
zh.howToPlay: 点击格子在黑色和白色之间切换。每个数字区域必须有相应数量的黑色格子。同一行/列中不能有3个或更多连续的黑色格子。
tips: 从数字较小的区域开始
注意避免3个或更多连续的黑色格子
使用边界约束来推断格子状态
